versions.version_description: It has no capo, and it's the way that Paramore's guitarist (Taylor York) plays it live and in studio.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro] [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  (2x) 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]    
When i was younger i saw my daddy cry and curse at the wind.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]                                                [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
He broke his own heart and I watched as he tried to re-assemble it.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                                  [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And my mamma swore she would never let herself forget.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                                                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
And that was the day that i promised I'd never sing of love if does not [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
exist. But darling..[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch] 
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]           
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                                  [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch] 
Maybe i know somewhere deep in my soul that love never lasts.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                                         [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
And we've got to find other ways to make it alone or keep a straight face.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                                       [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
And i've always lived like this keeping a comfortable, distance.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                                           [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
And up until now i swored to myself that i'm content with loneliness,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]
'cause none of it was ever worth the risk.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]
But you are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch] 
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]           
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]              
You are the only exception[/tab]

[BRIDGE] [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]
I've got a tight grip on reality,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]                      [ch]F#[/ch]
But i can't let go of whats part of me here.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
I know you're leaving tomorrow, when you wake up,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]                                  [ch]F#[/ch]                              
Leave me with some kind of proof it's not a dream. [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]
whoa [/tab]
 
[Chorus] x2
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]
But you are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch] 
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]           
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]              
You are the only exception[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]     
And i'm on my way to believing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
And i'm on my way to believing[/tab]
